message:
refactor(codegen): Enable DCE for stdlib and c_interop modules

- Add direct_import field to ImportInfo for DCE-friendly import paths
- Add Lib/Modules namespace structs to runtime.zig and c_interop.zig
- Replace hasModule() linear scan with StaticStringMap O(1) lookup
- Remove runtime loop over auto_registrable_modules (main DCE blocker)
- Update codegen to prefer direct_import when available

This enables Zig's dead code elimination to remove unused stdlib modules
from compiled binaries. Simple programs no longer pull in all 1250 modules.
